meaning: n.跳伞,将优先股发给股东作为红利之行为adj.救援行动的
examples: But the big bailout is coming.
So what is the bailout plan?
Who decides when to trigger a bailout?
Day by day, Congress is asking more questions about the bailout of the financial industry.
That would buy Spain time whilst being able to claim it had not sought a bailout.
